text: Site B upstream transect — dissolved oxygen 4.2 mg/L at 09:15, water temp 18.3°C, overcast. Benthic sample: moderate macroinvertebrate diversity; several sensitive taxa absent compared to reference reach.
Benthic macroinvertebrate protocol: kick-net sample, 3 minutes per transect, composite across riffle habitat. Preserve in 70% ethanol; label with site ID, date, and collector initials.

EPA ambient water quality criteria: dissolved oxygen should not fall below 5 mg/L for warmwater fisheries in most stream classifications. Chronic exposure below criterion indicates stress to aquatic life.
